'''dhochataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadded|coadded]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadded|coadded]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhochataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhochatithi|dhochatithi]] || [[word:dhochatiji|dhochatiji]] || [[word:dhochatishi|dhochatishi]] || [[word:dhochatiki|dhochatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhochatuthuthu|dhochatuthuthu]] || [[word:dhochatujuju|dhochatujuju]] || [[word:dhochatushushu|dhochatushushu]] || [[word:dhochatukuku|dhochatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhochatuthu|dhochatuthu]] || [[word:dhochatuju|dhochatuju]] || [[word:dhochatushu|dhochatushu]] || [[word:dhochatuku|dhochatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhochatufthuf|dhochatufthuf]] || [[word:dhochatufjuf|dhochatufjuf]] || [[word:dhochatufshuf|dhochatufshuf]] || [[word:dhochatufkuf|dhochatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhochatethe|dhochatethe]] || [[word:dhochateje|dhochateje]] || [[word:dhochateshe|dhochateshe]] || [[word:dhochateke|dhochateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhochatothotho|dhochatothotho]] || [[word:dhochatojojo|dhochatojojo]] || [[word:dhochatoshosho|dhochatoshosho]] || [[word:dhochatokoko|dhochatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhochatotho|dhochatotho]] || [[word:dhochatojo|dhochatojo]] || [[word:dhochatosho|dhochatosho]] || [[word:dhochatoko|dhochatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhochatofthof|dhochatofthof]] || [[word:dhochatofjof|dhochatofjof]] || [[word:dhochatofshof|dhochatofshof]] || [[word:dhochatofkof|dhochatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfthĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfjĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfshĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfkĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfthĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfjĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfshĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfkĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfthĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfjĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfshĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhochatĂŻfkĂŻf|dhochatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhochatĂŠthĂŠ|dhochatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhochatĂŠjĂŠ|dhochatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhochatĂŠshĂŠ|dhochatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhochatĂŠkĂŠ|dhochatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhochatathatha|dhochatathatha]] || [[word:dhochatajaja|dhochatajaja]] || [[word:dhochatashasha|dhochatashasha]] || [[word:dhochatakaka|dhochatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhochatatha|dhochatatha]] || [[word:dhochataja|dhochataja]] || [[word:dhochatasha|dhochatasha]] || [[word:dhochataka|dhochataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhochatafthaf|dhochatafthaf]] || [[word:dhochatafjaf|dhochatafjaf]] || [[word:dhochatafshaf|dhochatafshaf]] || [[word:dhochatafkaf|dhochatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhochatasha|dhochatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhochatshĂ«sha|dhochatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhochatrosha|dhochatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhochatmusha|dhochatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhochatyasha|dhochatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhochatnkshĂ«sha|godhochatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhochatnkrosha|godhochatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhochatnkmusha|godhochatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhochatnkyasha|godhochatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhochachatasha|dhochachatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhochachatshĂ«sha|dhochachatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhochachatrosha|dhochachatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhochachatmusha|dhochachatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhochachatyasha|dhochachatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhochachatnkshĂ«sha|godhochachatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhochachatnkrosha|godhochachatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhochachatnkmusha|godhochachatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhochachatnkyasha|godhochachatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhechĂŠtasha|dhechĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhechĂŠtshĂ«sha|dhechĂŠtshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhechĂŠtrosha|dhechĂŠtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhechĂŠtmusha|dhechĂŠtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhechĂŠtyasha|dhechĂŠtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhechĂŠtnkshĂ«sha|godhechĂŠtnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhechĂŠtnkrosha|godhechĂŠtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhechĂŠtnkmusha|godhechĂŠtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhechĂŠtnkyasha|godhechĂŠtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhochfatasha|dhochfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhochfatshĂ«sha|dhochfatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhochfatrosha|dhochfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhochfatmusha|dhochfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhochfatyasha|dhochfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhochfatnkshĂ«sha|godhochfatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhochfatnkrosha|godhochfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhochfatnkmusha|godhochfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhochfatnkyasha|godhochfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
